experiment: retrieval top-k / budget sweep for R2n_neural
finding: k was NOT optimised; the Phase-2/3/4 retrieval used budget-matched k~13 (1xB). At optimal k (2xB ~= all chunks) neural retrieval reaches 0.95 ~= full chat ~= B. So at EQUAL token budget B>retrieval (1.0 vs 0.825 = token efficiency); at UNLIMITED budget B~=retrieval (1.0 vs 0.95). DESi's edge over a well-tuned neural retriever is mostly token efficiency + low-budget supersession robustness, NOT a large capability gap. The budget-match understated retrieval and overstated DESi's edge.
